test_cases.description: Verify that the web/ directory exists at the repository root and contains its own package.json cleanly separated from the Go backend.
preconditions: Repository has been cloned and the scaffold has been applied
No package.json exists at the repository root for the frontend
test_cases.input: Filesystem state of the repository root after scaffold setup
test_cases.expected: web/package.json exists and is a valid JSON file with a 'name' field; no frontend package.json exists at the repository root
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
assert file_exists('web/package.json')
assert parse_json('web/package.json') is valid
assert 'name' in parse_json('web/package.json')
assert NOT file_exists('./package.json') OR parse_json('./package.json') does not contain frontend devDependencies like 'vite'

test_cases.description: Verify that npm is used as the package manager and that package-lock.json is committed inside web/.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied and npm install has been run inside web/
package-lock.json has been committed to version control
test_cases.expected: web/package-lock.json exists and is a valid JSON file; no yarn.lock or pnpm-lock.yaml exists inside web/
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
assert file_exists('web/package-lock.json')
assert parse_json('web/package-lock.json') is valid
assert NOT file_exists('web/yarn.lock')
assert NOT file_exists('web/pnpm-lock.yaml')

test_cases.description: Verify that web/tsconfig.json includes the four required compiler options: strict=true, moduleResolution=bundler, target=ESNext, and jsx=react-jsx.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
web/tsconfig.json exists
test_cases.expected: Parsed tsconfig.json compilerOptions contains strict=true, moduleResolution='bundler', target='ESNext', jsx='react-jsx'
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
tsconfig = parse_json('web/tsconfig.json')
options = tsconfig['compilerOptions']
assert options['strict'] == true
assert options['moduleResolution'].lower() == 'bundler'
assert options['target'] == 'ESNext'
assert options['jsx'] == 'react-jsx'

test_cases.description: Verify that web/components.json exists and is committed, confirming that npx shadcn-ui init was run as part of scaffold setup.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npx shadcn-ui init was executed during setup
test_cases.expected: web/components.json exists and is a valid JSON file containing shadcn/ui configuration keys
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
assert file_exists('web/components.json')
config = parse_json('web/components.json')
assert config is not empty
assert 'style' in config OR '$schema' in config

test_cases.description: Verify that Vite is listed as a dev dependency in web/package.json and is installed in web/node_modules.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
test_cases.expected: Vite appears in devDependencies of package.json and web/node_modules/vite directory exists
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
pkg = parse_json('web/package.json')
assert 'vite' in pkg.get('devDependencies', {})
assert directory_exists('web/node_modules/vite')

test_cases.description: Verify that React is listed as a dependency in web/package.json and is installed in web/node_modules.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
test_cases.expected: react and react-dom appear in dependencies of package.json and their node_modules directories exist
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
pkg = parse_json('web/package.json')
deps = {**pkg.get('dependencies', {}), **pkg.get('devDependencies', {})}
assert 'react' in deps
assert 'react-dom' in deps
assert directory_exists('web/node_modules/react')
assert directory_exists('web/node_modules/react-dom')

test_cases.description: Verify that Tailwind CSS is listed as a dependency in web/package.json and is installed.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
test_cases.expected: tailwindcss appears in devDependencies of package.json and web/node_modules/tailwindcss directory exists
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
pkg = parse_json('web/package.json')
deps = {**pkg.get('dependencies', {}), **pkg.get('devDependencies', {})}
assert 'tailwindcss' in deps
assert directory_exists('web/node_modules/tailwindcss')

test_cases.description: Verify that TanStack Query is listed in web/package.json and installed in web/node_modules.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
test_cases.expected: @tanstack/react-query appears in dependencies of package.json and its node_modules directory exists
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
pkg = parse_json('web/package.json')
deps = {**pkg.get('dependencies', {}), **pkg.get('devDependencies', {})}
assert '@tanstack/react-query' in deps
assert directory_exists('web/node_modules/@tanstack/react-query')

test_cases.description: Verify that React Router is listed in web/package.json and installed in web/node_modules.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
test_cases.expected: react-router-dom (or react-router) appears in dependencies of package.json and its node_modules directory exists
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
pkg = parse_json('web/package.json')
deps = {**pkg.get('dependencies', {}), **pkg.get('devDependencies', {})}
assert 'react-router-dom' in deps OR 'react-router' in deps
assert directory_exists('web/node_modules/react-router-dom') OR directory_exists('web/node_modules/react-router')

test_cases.description: Verify that npm run build exits with code 0 and produces output in web/dist/ containing at least one HTML file and bundled assets.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
web/index.html, web/src/main.tsx, and web/src/App.tsx exist
test_cases.input: Run 'npm run build' from within web/ directory
test_cases.expected: Process exits with code 0; web/dist/ directory exists and contains at least one .html file and at least one .js file
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
result = run_command('npm run build', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code == 0
assert directory_exists('web/dist/')
html_files = glob('web/dist/**/*.html')
js_files = glob('web/dist/**/*.js')
assert len(html_files) >= 1
assert len(js_files) >= 1

test_cases.description: Verify that npm run lint exits with code 0 and reports zero errors against the @typescript-eslint/recommended ruleset for the scaffold source files.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
ESLint is configured with @typescript-eslint/recommended
test_cases.input: Run 'npm run lint' from within web/ directory
test_cases.expected: Process exits with code 0; stdout/stderr contains no error messages
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
result = run_command('npm run lint', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code == 0
assert 'error' not in result.stdout.lower() OR error_count_in_output(result.stdout) == 0

test_cases.description: Verify that the dev proxy forwards requests matching /api, /healthz, and /readyz to the Go backend at http://localhost:8080.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied and npm install has been run inside web/
Go backend is running and listening on port 8080
Vite dev server is running with the proxy configuration active
test_cases.input: HTTP GET requests to /api, /healthz, and /readyz via the Vite dev server URL
test_cases.expected: Each proxied request reaches the Go backend; response received by client matches Go backend's response verbatim
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
for path in ['/healthz', '/readyz', '/api']:
  response = http_get(VITE_DEV_URL + path)
  backend_response = http_get('http://localhost:8080' + path)
  assert response.status_code == backend_response.status_code
  assert response.body == backend_response.body

test_cases.description: Verify that the dev proxy is active by default whenever the Vite dev server runs without requiring additional developer steps.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied and npm install has been run inside web/
Vite dev server has been started with 'npm run dev' or 'make web-dev' with no additional flags
test_cases.input: Vite configuration file in the web/ project
test_cases.expected: Vite config file contains a proxy configuration block mapping /api, /healthz, and /readyz to http://localhost:8080; no extra env vars or flags required
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
vite_config_content = read_file(find_vite_config('web/'))
assert '/api' in vite_config_content
assert '/healthz' in vite_config_content
assert '/readyz' in vite_config_content
assert 'http://localhost:8080' in vite_config_content

test_cases.description: Verify that the ESLint configuration extends @typescript-eslint/recommended on top of the Vite-generated default.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
ESLint config file exists (eslint.config.js or .eslintrc.cjs)
test_cases.input: Contents of ESLint config file in web/
test_cases.expected: ESLint config references '@typescript-eslint/recommended' as an extended or imported ruleset
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
eslint_config = read_file(find_eslint_config('web/'))
assert '@typescript-eslint/recommended' in eslint_config OR 'typescript-eslint' in eslint_config

test_cases.description: Verify that an ESLint config file exists in web/ in either flat config format or legacy format.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
test_cases.expected: Either web/eslint.config.js or web/.eslintrc.cjs exists
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode: assert file_exists('web/eslint.config.js') OR file_exists('web/.eslintrc.cjs') OR file_exists('web/eslint.config.ts') OR file_exists('web/eslint.config.mjs')

test_cases.description: Verify that 'make web-dev' starts the Vite dev server process in the web/ directory.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
Root Makefile contains the web-dev target
test_cases.input: Run 'make web-dev' from the repository root
test_cases.expected: The Vite dev server process starts and prints its listening URL to stdout; process remains running (does not exit immediately)
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
proc = start_process('make web-dev', cwd='repo_root')
wait_for_output(proc, 'localhost', timeout=15)
assert proc.is_running()
assert 'localhost' in proc.stdout_so_far OR 'Local:' in proc.stdout_so_far
proc.terminate()

test_cases.description: Verify that 'make web-build' runs a Vite production build and exits with code 0 with web/dist/ populated.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
Root Makefile contains the web-build target
test_cases.input: Run 'make web-build' from the repository root
test_cases.expected: make exits with code 0; web/dist/ directory exists and contains bundled HTML, JS, and CSS assets
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
result = run_command('make web-build', cwd='repo_root')
assert result.exit_code == 0
assert directory_exists('web/dist/')
assert len(glob('web/dist/**/*.html')) >= 1
assert len(glob('web/dist/**/*.js')) >= 1

test_cases.description: Verify that 'make web-lint' runs ESLint and TypeScript type checking via npm run lint in web/ and exits with code 0 for clean scaffold sources.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
Root Makefile contains the web-lint target
test_cases.input: Run 'make web-lint' from the repository root
test_cases.expected: make exits with code 0; no error diagnostics are printed to stdout or stderr
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
result = run_command('make web-lint', cwd='repo_root')
assert result.exit_code == 0

test_cases.description: Verify that web/index.html exists and is Vite's required HTML entry point.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
test_cases.expected: web/index.html exists and contains a script tag referencing the main.tsx entry point
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
assert file_exists('web/index.html')
content = read_file('web/index.html')
assert 'src/main.tsx' in content OR 'main.tsx' in content

test_cases.description: Verify that web/src/main.tsx exists and mounts the React app into the DOM.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
test_cases.expected: web/src/main.tsx exists and contains a ReactDOM.createRoot or ReactDOM.render call mounting the App component
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
assert file_exists('web/src/main.tsx')
content = read_file('web/src/main.tsx')
assert 'createRoot' in content OR 'render' in content
assert 'App' in content

test_cases.description: Verify that web/src/App.tsx contains a root React component that renders an <h1> element with the text 'af-hub'.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
test_cases.expected: web/src/App.tsx exists and its JSX contains an <h1> element with text content 'af-hub'
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
assert file_exists('web/src/App.tsx')
content = read_file('web/src/App.tsx')
assert '<h1>' in content
assert 'af-hub' in content

test_cases.description: Verify that navigating to the Vite dev server root URL renders a page with an <h1> element containing 'af-hub'.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
Vite dev server is running (via make web-dev or npm run dev)
test_cases.input: HTTP GET request to the Vite dev server root URL (e.g., http://localhost:5173/)
test_cases.expected: Response body contains an <h1> element; when executed in a browser context with JavaScript, the rendered DOM has exactly one <h1> element with text content 'af-hub'
test_cases.assertion_pseudocode:
page = browser_navigate(VITE_DEV_URL + '/')
h1_elements = page.query_selector_all('h1')
assert len(h1_elements) == 1
assert h1_elements[0].inner_text().strip() == 'af-hub'

property_tests.description: Verify that npm run build always exits with code 0 and produces output in web/dist/ containing at least one HTML file, given the scaffold source files and committed package-lock.json.
property_tests.for_any_strategy: The scaffold source files in web/src/ in their committed state; npm install is performed using the committed web/package-lock.json before each build run
property_tests.invariant_check:
result = run_command('npm run build', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code == 0
assert directory_exists('web/dist/')
assert len(glob('web/dist/**/*.html')) >= 1
# Termination: build must complete within a bounded time window
assert result.duration_seconds <= 120

property_tests.description: Verify that npm run lint exits with code 0 and reports zero errors for every source file shipped by the scaffold, confirming the lint-clean baseline.
property_tests.for_any_strategy: Each individual TypeScript source file in web/src/ as committed in the scaffold (App.tsx, main.tsx, and any generated files); ESLint is invoked targeting that file
property_tests.invariant_check:
for each source_file in glob('web/src/**/*.tsx') + glob('web/src/**/*.ts'):
  result = run_command('npm run lint -- ' + source_file, cwd='web/')
  assert result.exit_code == 0
  assert error_count_in_output(result.stdout + result.stderr) == 0
# Termination: lint must complete within a bounded time window
assert result.duration_seconds <= 60

property_tests.description: Verify that web/tsconfig.json with strict=true produces zero type errors when checked against all scaffold source files.
property_tests.for_any_strategy: All TypeScript source files in web/src/ as shipped by the scaffold; tsc --noEmit is run against the entire project using web/tsconfig.json
property_tests.invariant_check:
result = run_command('npx tsc --noEmit', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code == 0
assert 'error TS' not in result.stdout
assert 'error TS' not in result.stderr
# Verify strict mode is active by confirming tsconfig option
tsconfig = parse_json('web/tsconfig.json')
assert tsconfig['compilerOptions']['strict'] == true

property_tests.description: Verify that for any request path beginning with /api, /healthz, or /readyz, the dev proxy forwards the request to http://localhost:8080 and never serves a local asset or SPA fallback.
property_tests.for_any_strategy: Request paths drawn from: /api, /api/anything, /api/v1/resource, /healthz, /healthz/details, /readyz, /readyz/status; Go backend running on port 8080 returning a known sentinel response body
property_tests.invariant_check:
for each path in proxy_paths:
  backend_mock_response = 'BACKEND_SENTINEL'
  mock_backend_at(8080, path, response=backend_mock_response)
  client_response = http_get(VITE_DEV_URL + path)
  assert client_response.body == backend_mock_response
  assert 'af-hub' not in client_response.body
  assert client_response.status_code != 404 OR client_response reflects backend 404

property_tests.description: Verify that for any browser navigation to the Vite dev server root URL /, the rendered DOM contains exactly one <h1> element with text content 'af-hub'.
property_tests.for_any_strategy: Browser navigation to the Vite dev server root URL / repeated across multiple browser contexts (e.g., fresh page load, hard reload, navigation from a different path)
property_tests.invariant_check:
for each navigation_attempt in range(3):
  page = browser_navigate(VITE_DEV_URL + '/')
  h1_elements = page.query_selector_all('h1')
  assert len(h1_elements) == 1
  assert h1_elements[0].inner_text().strip() == 'af-hub'

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that npm commands fail with a clear error when package.json is absent from web/ or located at the wrong path.
preconditions: Repository is cloned but web/package.json does not exist (simulating missing frontend project initialization)
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run build' from within web/ directory when web/package.json is absent
edge_case_tests.expected: npm exits with non-zero exit code; stderr contains an error message indicating missing package.json or that the frontend project is not initialized
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
remove_file('web/package.json')
result = run_command('npm run build', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code != 0
assert 'package.json' in result.stderr OR 'no such file' in result.stderr.lower() OR 'missing' in result.stderr.lower()

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that npm run build fails with non-zero exit code and prints TypeScript error diagnostics when source files contain type errors.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
A TypeScript source file in web/src/ has been modified to introduce a deliberate type error (e.g., assigning a string to a number)
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run build' from within web/ with a TypeScript error in web/src/App.tsx
edge_case_tests.expected: Process exits with non-zero code; stderr or stdout contains TypeScript error diagnostics including the file name and error description
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
write_file('web/src/App.tsx', 'const x: number = "bad_type"; export default function App() { return

af-hub

; }') result = run_command('npm run build', cwd='web/') assert result.exit_code != 0 assert 'error' in result.stderr.lower() OR 'error' in result.stdout.lower() assert 'App.tsx' in result.stderr OR 'App.tsx' in result.stdout

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that npm run lint exits with non-zero code and reports ESLint violations with file name, line number, and rule name when source files violate ESLint rules.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
A TypeScript source file in web/src/ has been modified to introduce a deliberate ESLint violation (e.g., unused variable)
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run lint' from within web/ with an ESLint violation in web/src/App.tsx
edge_case_tests.expected: Process exits with non-zero code; stdout or stderr contains violation details including file path, line number, and ESLint rule name
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
write_file('web/src/App.tsx', 'const unused = 42; export default function App() { return

af-hub

; }') result = run_command('npm run lint', cwd='web/') assert result.exit_code != 0 output = result.stdout + result.stderr assert 'App.tsx' in output assert any(char.isdigit() for char in output) # line number present assert 'error' in output.lower() OR 'warning' in output.lower()

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that npm run build and npm run lint fail with a descriptive error referencing missing modules when node_modules/ is absent.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied with package.json present
node_modules/ directory has been removed or never created inside web/
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' from within web/ when web/node_modules/ is absent
edge_case_tests.expected: Both commands exit with non-zero code; error output references missing modules or indicates that npm install must be run
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
remove_directory('web/node_modules/')
result_build = run_command('npm run build', cwd='web/')
assert result_build.exit_code != 0
assert 'cannot find module' in result_build.stderr.lower() OR 'missing' in result_build.stderr.lower() OR 'not found' in result_build.stderr.lower()
result_lint = run_command('npm run lint', cwd='web/')
assert result_lint.exit_code != 0

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that when the Go backend is not running, proxied requests to /healthz fail at the network level with a connection error and no custom error wrapping.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied and npm install has been run inside web/
Vite dev server is running with proxy configuration active
Go backend is NOT running (port 8080 is not listening)
edge_case_tests.input: HTTP GET request to Vite dev server at /healthz when Go backend is not running
edge_case_tests.expected: Browser or curl receives a network-level connection error (ECONNREFUSED or equivalent 502/504 from Vite proxy); no custom error page or application-level response body is returned
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
ensure_port_not_listening(8080)
result = http_get_raw(VITE_DEV_URL + '/healthz', ignore_errors=True)
assert result.network_error == True OR result.status_code in [502, 504]
assert result.body is None OR result.body does not contain 'af-hub'

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that requests to paths not matching /api, /healthz, or /readyz are served directly by Vite without proxying to the Go backend.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied and npm install has been run inside web/
Vite dev server is running with proxy configuration active
Go backend is NOT running (to confirm no proxy involvement)
edge_case_tests.input: HTTP GET request to Vite dev server at a non-proxied path such as /some-other-path
edge_case_tests.expected: Vite handles the request normally, returning the SPA index.html (200 response) without attempting to proxy to port 8080
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
ensure_port_not_listening(8080)
result = http_get(VITE_DEV_URL + '/some-other-path')
assert result.status_code == 200
assert 'af-hub' in result.body OR 'text/html' in result.headers.get('content-type', '')

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that ESLint fails to start and reports a missing plugin error when the @typescript-eslint/recommended package is not installed.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
@typescript-eslint packages have been removed from node_modules/ but package.json and ESLint config still reference them
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run lint' from within web/ when @typescript-eslint packages are missing from node_modules/
edge_case_tests.expected: Process exits with non-zero code; error output identifies the missing @typescript-eslint package by name
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
remove_directory('web/node_modules/@typescript-eslint')
result = run_command('npm run lint', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code != 0
output = result.stdout + result.stderr
assert 'typescript-eslint' in output.lower() OR 'cannot find module' in output.lower() OR 'plugin' in output.lower()

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that 'make web-build' and 'make web-lint' fail with actionable error messages when npm dependencies in web/ are not installed.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied with package.json present
node_modules/ directory is absent inside web/
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'make web-build' from the repository root when web/node_modules/ is absent
edge_case_tests.expected: make exits with non-zero code; error output references missing modules or directs the developer to run npm install in web/

assert result.exit_code != 0
output = result.stdout + result.stderr
assert 'npm install' in output.lower() OR 'cannot find module' in output.lower() OR 'not found' in output.lower()

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that 'npm run build' fails with a descriptive error when web/src/main.tsx or web/src/App.tsx is absent.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
web/src/main.tsx has been deleted
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run build' from within web/ when web/src/main.tsx is absent
edge_case_tests.expected: Process exits with non-zero code; error output references the missing entry point file (main.tsx or App.tsx)

edge_case_tests.description: Verify that 'npm run build' fails with a descriptive error identifying the missing HTML entry point when web/index.html is absent.
preconditions: Scaffold has been applied
npm install has been run inside web/
web/index.html has been deleted
edge_case_tests.input: Run 'npm run build' from within web/ when web/index.html is absent
edge_case_tests.expected: Process exits with non-zero code; error output references the missing index.html file
edge_case_tests.assertion_pseudocode:
remove_file('web/index.html')
result = run_command('npm run build', cwd='web/')
assert result.exit_code != 0
output = result.stdout + result.stderr
assert 'index.html' in output OR 'entry' in output.lower() OR 'not found' in output.lower()

smoke_tests.description:
End-to-end smoke test: developer runs make web-dev, navigates to the Vite dev server URL, and verifies the placeholder

af-hub

heading is rendered in the browser.
smoke_tests.trigger: Run 'make web-dev' from the repository root; then navigate a browser to the Vite dev server URL
expected_effects: make web-dev starts the Vite dev server process without exiting immediately
Vite dev server prints its listening URL to stdout
HTTP GET to the Vite dev server root URL returns HTTP 200
Rendered DOM contains exactly one <h1> element with text content 'af-hub'

smoke_tests.description: End-to-end smoke test: developer runs make web-build and verifies the production build completes successfully with web/dist/ populated.
smoke_tests.trigger: Run 'make web-build' from the repository root after npm install has been run in web/
expected_effects: web/dist/ contains at least one .html file
web/dist/ contains at least one .js bundle file
No TypeScript or Vite build errors are printed to stderr

smoke_tests.description: End-to-end smoke test: developer runs make web-lint and verifies ESLint and TypeScript type checking both pass with code 0 for the scaffold sources.
smoke_tests.trigger: Run 'make web-lint' from the repository root after npm install has been run in web/
expected_effects: No ESLint rule violations are reported
No TypeScript type errors are reported

smoke_tests.description: End-to-end smoke test: developer starts the Go backend and Vite dev server, then makes a request to /healthz and verifies the response comes from the Go backend via the dev proxy.
smoke_tests.trigger: Start Go backend on port 8080, run make web-dev, then send HTTP GET to Vite dev server URL at /healthz
real_components: Vite dev server with proxy configuration
mockable: Go backend (can be replaced with any HTTP server on port 8080 returning a sentinel response to /healthz)
expected_effects: Vite dev server starts and proxy configuration is active
HTTP GET to Vite dev server URL at /healthz receives a response
